MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-14-2017 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 36 AND 36.5. LEON ROUBINIAN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. BRETT MORONEY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC AND RASIER-CA, LLC. RADHIKA THANEDAR, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT ATESO ANELU. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS JAN-02-2018 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF JAN. 12, 2018. THE ORIGINAL COURT TRIAL DATE OF 3/26/18 IS VACATED. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 12/28/17. SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON REGULAR NOTICE PURSUANT TO THE RELEVANT PROVISIONS OF THE CCP, UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY NOT YET SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARE DUE 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE CCP, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 12/15/17. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 12/29/17. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. IT SHALL OCCUR IN PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
